license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pshmne
title: DNA Gel Electrophoresis
author: NUS iGEM

steps_raw.instruction: Load 10 µL of 6X loading dye into 50 µL of P product DNA Gel Loading Dye (6X) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #R0611
Mix and load entire volume into 1% agarose gel
Visualize band under blue light transilluminator
